description: Comprehensive catalog of 100 financial blocks (finBlocks) for retail investor dashboards

blocks.name: Portfolio KPI Summary
blocks.description: Total value, total P&L, YTD return, and Sharpe ratio

blocks.name: Holdings Detail Table
blocks.description: Complete list of all holdings with symbol, shares, cost basis, current value, P&L, P&L %

blocks.name: Sector Allocation Breakdown
blocks.description: Portfolio allocation across business sectors (Technology, Healthcare, Finance, etc.)

blocks.name: Asset Class Allocation
blocks.description: Breakdown of stocks vs ETFs vs bonds vs cash

blocks.name: Portfolio vs Benchmark Returns
blocks.description: Compare portfolio cumulative returns against S&P 500 or custom benchmark

blocks.name: Top Holdings Recent Price Action
blocks.description: Last 2 weeks of price movements for top 5-10 holdings with sparklines

blocks.name: Top and Bottom Performers
blocks.description: Best and worst performing holdings by return %

blocks.name: Monthly Portfolio Returns
blocks.description: Bar chart of portfolio returns by month for last 12 months

blocks.name: Portfolio Concentration Risk
blocks.description: Top 10 holdings as % of portfolio - identifies concentration risk

blocks.name: Recent Trades and Turnover
blocks.description: Recent buy/sell activity and portfolio turnover rate

blocks.name: Portfolio Dividend Metrics
blocks.description: Annual dividend income, yield, next ex-dividend date

blocks.name: Stock Price & Key Metrics
blocks.description: Current price, market cap, P/E ratio, dividend yield, 52-week range

blocks.name: Price History with Moving Averages
blocks.description: 12-month price history with 50-day and 200-day moving averages

blocks.name: Fundamental Metrics Comparison
blocks.description: P/E, P/B, ROE, debt/equity, dividend yield ranked against peers

blocks.name: Quarterly Earnings History
blocks.description: Last 8 quarters of revenue, EPS, earnings beat/miss

blocks.name: Analyst Ratings & Target Price
blocks.description: Buy/hold/sell consensus and average price target

blocks.name: Dividend History & Growth
blocks.description: Dividend per share over last 10 years showing growth trend

blocks.name: Valuation vs Sector & Market
blocks.description: Compare stock P/E, P/B, dividend yield to sector average and S&P 500

blocks.name: Insider Buying/Selling Activity
blocks.description: Recent insider transactions and net ownership changes

blocks.name: Technical Indicators Summary
blocks.description: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands status - overbought/oversold signals

blocks.name: Volume Trend Analysis
blocks.description: Trading volume over last 3 months with average comparison

blocks.name: Growth Rates (Revenue, EPS, Free Cash Flow)
blocks.description: YoY growth rates for key metrics showing business acceleration/deceleration

blocks.name: ETF Comparison Metrics
blocks.description: Compare expense ratio, AUM, dividend yield, 1Y/3Y/5Y returns across ETFs

blocks.name: ETF Performance Comparison
blocks.description: Cumulative returns comparison for multiple ETFs over time

blocks.name: ETF Sector Composition
blocks.description: Sector breakdown within an ETF

blocks.name: Top 10 ETF Holdings
blocks.description: Largest positions within an ETF

blocks.name: ETF Risk Metrics
blocks.description: Volatility, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, beta for ETF

blocks.name: ETF Dividend Yield Over Time
blocks.description: Dividend yield trend for distribution-focused ETF

blocks.name: ETF Overlap & Redundancy
blocks.description: Shows common holdings between multiple ETFs to identify overlap

blocks.name: Expense Ratio Impact on Returns
blocks.description: Shows how fees compound over time at different return assumptions

blocks.name: Geographic Exposure
blocks.description: Country/region breakdown for international ETFs

blocks.name: ETF Tax Efficiency
blocks.description: Distribution yield vs SEC yield, tracking error, tax loss harvesting potential

blocks.name: Risk Metrics Summary
blocks.description: VaR (95%), Volatility (annual), Max Drawdown, Beta, Sharpe ratio

blocks.name: Volatility Breakdown by Holding
blocks.description: Individual stock volatility ranked from highest to lowest

blocks.name: Concentration Risk Index
blocks.description: Top 10 holdings as % of portfolio, HHI concentration index

blocks.name: Correlation Matrix
blocks.description: Correlation between top holdings showing diversification benefits

blocks.name: Historical Drawdown Analysis
blocks.description: Peak-to-trough declines over last 3 years with recovery times

blocks.name: VaR Under Different Scenarios
blocks.description: Value at Risk at different confidence levels (90%, 95%, 99%)

blocks.name: Beta & Systematic Risk
blocks.description: Portfolio beta vs S&P 500, sensitivity to market movements

blocks.name: Downside Risk (Sortino Ratio)
blocks.description: Downside deviation vs full volatility, Sortino ratio

blocks.name: Risk by Sector
blocks.description: Volatility and risk contribution by sector

blocks.name: Stress Test Scenarios
blocks.description: Portfolio impact under historical stress scenarios (2008, 2020, etc.)

blocks.name: Risk Limits Monitoring
blocks.description: Current vs target for VaR limit, volatility limit, concentration limit

blocks.name: Annual Returns Comparison
blocks.description: Year-by-year returns vs benchmark for last 5-10 years

blocks.name: Return Distribution Analysis
blocks.description: Histogram of monthly returns showing distribution shape

blocks.name: Win Rate & Consistency
blocks.description: % positive months, best/worst month, average monthly return

blocks.name: Risk-Adjusted Return Metrics
blocks.description: Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, Calmar ratio, information ratio

blocks.name: Performance Attribution
blocks.description: Breakdown of returns by holding - which positions drove performance

blocks.name: Upside/Downside Capture Ratios
blocks.description: % of benchmark upside captured vs % of downside avoided

blocks.name: Rolling Returns Analysis
blocks.description: Rolling 12-month, 3-year, 5-year returns showing consistency

blocks.name: Best & Worst Performing Periods
blocks.description: Top and bottom N days/weeks/months showing extreme performance

blocks.name: Alpha Generation Analysis
blocks.description: Excess return (alpha) vs benchmark with statistical significance

blocks.name: Returns vs Investment Goals
blocks.description: Current return rate vs target for retirement/goals

blocks.name: Time-Weighted vs Money-Weighted Returns
blocks.description: TWR (manager performance) vs MWR (investor returns) comparison

blocks.name: Annual Dividend Income Summary
blocks.description: Total annual dividend income, yield, monthly average

blocks.name: Dividend-Paying Holdings
blocks.description: All dividend payers with symbol, yield, annual payment, next ex-date

blocks.name: Monthly Dividend Income Trend
blocks.description: Monthly dividend income over last 12 months showing seasonality

blocks.name: Top Dividend Yielders
blocks.description: Holdings ranked by dividend yield

blocks.name: Dividend Growth Rate
blocks.description: YoY dividend per share growth showing dividend growth trajectory

blocks.name: Dividend Yield by Sector
blocks.description: Average dividend yield for each sector in portfolio

blocks.name: Dividend Coverage & Sustainability
blocks.description: Payout ratio and free cash flow coverage for dividend safety

blocks.name: Income vs Withdrawal Needs
blocks.description: Annual dividend income vs target withdrawal for retirement

blocks.name: Upcoming Dividend/Distribution Calendar
blocks.description: Next 90 days of ex-dates, record dates, and payment dates

sector.description: Sector and asset class analysis finBlocks

blocks.name: Sector Performance Comparison
blocks.description: Annual returns by sector showing best/worst performing sectors

blocks.name: Holdings by Sector
blocks.description: All holdings organized by sector with allocation and performance

blocks.name: Volatility by Sector
blocks.description: Risk level (volatility) for each sector in portfolio

blocks.name: Average Valuation by Sector
blocks.description: Average P/E and P/B ratios for sectors in portfolio

blocks.name: Sector Rotation Signals
blocks.description: Technical indicators (momentum, trend) for sector rotation

blocks.name: Sector Correlation Analysis
blocks.description: How sectors move together - diversification within sectors

blocks.name: Economic Cycle Positioning
blocks.description: Sector positions aligned with growth/value/defensive cycles

blocks.name: Sector Rebalancing Opportunities
blocks.description: Sectors over/underweight vs target allocation

blocks.name: Dividend Income by Sector
blocks.description: Which sectors contribute to portfolio dividend income

blocks.name: RSI Overbought/Oversold Signals
blocks.description: Holdings with RSI > 70 (overbought) or < 30 (oversold)

blocks.name: MACD Trend Following Signals
blocks.description: Holdings with MACD crossovers (bullish/bearish)

blocks.name: Moving Average Signals
blocks.description: Price above/below 50/200 day moving averages for each holding

blocks.name: Bollinger Band Volatility
blocks.description: Holdings in Bollinger Band squeeze (low volatility, potential breakout)

blocks.name: Support & Resistance Levels
blocks.description: Key support and resistance prices for top holdings

blocks.name: Volume Trend Signals
blocks.description: Above/below average volume confirming price moves

blocks.name: Stochastic Oscillator Signals
blocks.description: Stochastic values indicating momentum and entry signals

blocks.name: Earnings Quality Assessment
blocks.description: Revenue vs earnings growth, quality of earnings indicators

blocks.name: Profitability Margins Over Time
blocks.description: Gross, operating, net margins trend showing profitability

blocks.name: Leverage & Debt Metrics
blocks.description: Debt-to-equity, debt-to-assets, interest coverage trend

blocks.name: Free Cash Flow & Sustainability
blocks.description: Operating cash flow vs capital expenditure showing cash generation

blocks.name: Return on Capital (ROIC/ROE/ROA)
blocks.description: Capital efficiency metrics showing how well company uses capital

blocks.name: Revenue Growth Sources
blocks.description: Organic growth vs acquisitions vs price increases

blocks.name: Balance Sheet Strength
blocks.description: Current ratio, quick ratio, working capital metrics

blocks.name: Competitive Advantage Indicators
blocks.description: Metrics suggesting durable competitive moat (pricing power, retention, uniqueness)

blocks.name: Tax-Loss Harvesting Candidates
blocks.description: Holdings with unrealized losses available for tax-loss harvesting

blocks.name: Long-term vs Short-term Gains Tax Analysis
blocks.description: Unrealized gains categorized by holding period (tax efficiency)

blocks.name: Estimated Tax Liability
blocks.description: Unrealized gains and expected tax liability if liquidated

blocks.name: Cost Basis Summary
blocks.description: Aggregate cost basis, current value, unrealized gains/losses

blocks.name: State Tax Efficiency
blocks.description: Tax implications if moving to different state (state income tax)

blocks.name: Charitable Giving Opportunity (Donate Appreciated Stock)
blocks.description: Identify appreciated holdings suitable for charitable donations

blocks.name: Quarterly Estimated Tax Payments
blocks.description: Expected quarterly tax payments based on dividend and capital gains

blocks.name: Price Alert Monitoring
blocks.description: Holdings with active price alerts (above/below target)

blocks.name: Portfolio Drift from Target
blocks.description: Holdings that have drifted from target allocation requiring rebalancing

blocks.name: Upcoming Earnings Dates
blocks.description: Next earnings announcements for portfolio holdings

blocks.name: News & Sentiment Monitoring
blocks.description: Recent news and sentiment (bullish/bearish) for holdings

blocks.name: Dividend Announcements
blocks.description: Recent dividend announcements, increases, cuts, suspensions

blocks.name: Analyst Rating Changes
blocks.description: Recent analyst upgrades/downgrades for holdings

blocks.name: Volatility Spike Alerts
blocks.description: Holdings with unusual volatility spikes or VIX alerts

blocks.name: Stock Buyback Announcements
blocks.description: Companies announcing or executing share buybacks

blocks.name: SEC Filing Monitoring
blocks.description: Recent 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K filings for holdings
